zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Leighton於1181年出生在英國史洛普爾麗頓時，他的父親William de Leighton32歲，母親Avicia Or Amice Or Alice Butler29歲。他於大約1211年與Alice La Strange結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Leighton于1181年出生在英国史洛普爾麗頓时，他的父亲William de Leighton32岁，母亲Avicia Or Amice Or Alice Butler29岁。他于大约1211年与Alice La Strange结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Leighton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Leighton or Layton. Most, as for example those in Bedfordshire, Cambridgeshire, Cheshire, Lancashire, and Shropshire, are named with Old English lēac ‘leek’ + tūn ‘settlement’, but Layton in Durham derives from Old English ge-lād ‘road’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English pronunciation of Leighton is usually /lɛ:tən/ or /leitən/ (also spelled Layton and Leaton ), but it can also be heard as /laitən/ or as /li:tən/ (also spelled Leaton ), and occasionally as /lɛtən/ (spelled Letton ).

variants.name: Slayton
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Leighton (compare Layton ) with the addition of initial S-. Alternatively, perhaps a variant of Sladen or of Sleightholme, principally a habitational name from Sleightholme Dale in Kirkbymoorside, but perhaps occasionally from Sleightholme in Bowes or the lost Sleightholme in Lythe. The placenames derive from Old Norse sléttr ‘smooth, level’ + holmr ‘small island, water meadow’. This surname is now very rare in Britain. Compare Slaydon .

variants.name: Laughton
meanings: habitational name from Laughton en le Morthen in Yorkshire, Laughton in Leicestershire or any of the two places called Laughton in Lincolnshire (one near Gainsborough and another near Folkingham). The places are named with Old English lēac ‘leek’ + tūn ‘enclosure’, meaning ‘village or farm where leeks are grown’. It may sometimes have alternated with Leighton , which is mostly from placenames with the same etymology.

variants.name: Letton
meanings: English: habitational name, most probably from Letton in Norfolk or Latton in Essex. It could also be a variant of Leighton or Laughton . Most of the places so named have the same etymology as Letton and Latton, i.e. ‘farm where leeks are grown’ (Old English lēac-tūn). Another possibility is that it is a variant of Latten .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Leighton was born in 1181, in Leighton, Shropshire, England, his father, William de Leighton, was 32 and his mother, Avicia Or Amice Or Alice Butler, was 29. He married Alice La Strange about 1211. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Leighton est né en 1181, à Leighton, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Leighton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Avicia Or Amice Or Alice Butler, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Alice La Strange environ 1211. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Leighton 1181 in Leighton, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Leighton 32 und seine Mutter Avicia Or Amice Or Alice Butler 29. Er hat um 1211 Alice La Strange geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Leighton è nato il nel 1181 nel Leighton, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, William de Leighton, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Avicia Or Amice Or Alice Butler, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Alice La Strange circa 1211. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Leighton, Shropshire, England: イギリスシュロプシュアイアレイトン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Leightonが1181年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアレイトンで生まれた時，父William de Leightonは32歳，母Avicia Or Amice Or Alice Butlerは29歳であった。約1211年にAlice La Strangeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Leighton(이)가 1181년 영국 슈럽실르 레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Leighton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Avicia Or Amice Or Alice Butler(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1211년 Alice La Strange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Leighton nasceu em 1181, em Leighton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Leighton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Avicia Or Amice Or Alice Butler, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice La Strange aproximadamente 1211. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Leighton родился в 1181 г. в местности лиитон, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Leighton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Avicia Or Amice Or Alice Butler, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice La Strange около 1211 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Leighton nació en 1181, en Leighton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Leighton, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Avicia Or Amice Or Alice Butler, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Alice La Strange aproximadamente 1211. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
